tool_args.label: M79 Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: M79 Select Bus Service (SBS) launched on May 21st, 2017, replacing M79 Local service along 79th Street from FDR Drive to Riverside Drive. At just over two miles, the M79 is a crucial connection to the trains and 16 bus routes, including M15 SBS.

payload.description: M79 SBS launched May 2017 replacing M79 Local along 79th Street from FDR Drive to Riverside Drive. At just over two miles, it connects to the trains and 16 bus routes including M15 SBS. Includes bus lanes, signal timing improvements, off-board fare payment, and real-time passenger information.

tool_args.label: M79 SBS
tool_args.raw_text: M79 Select Bus Service (SBS) launched on May 21st, 2017, replacing M79 Local service along 79th Street from FDR Drive to Riverside Drive.

tool_args.label: 79th Street Corridor
tool_args.raw_text: M79 Select Bus Service (SBS) launched on May 21st, 2017, replacing M79 Local service along 79th Street from FDR Drive to Riverside Drive

payload.limits: from FDR Drive to Riverside Drive
payload.description: M79 SBS route along 79th Street. The route runs east along W 79 Street, turns north onto Central Park West, continues east through Central Park, then turns south onto East 86 Street, heading east to York Avenue, then south onto E 80 Street to East End Avenue, and finally south onto E 79 Street ending at East End Avenue.

tool_args.label: M79 SBS Capital Project
tool_args.raw_text: The 79th Street SBS capital project will build upon the improvements made for the 2017 M79 SBS launch, with the goals of further improving bus speeds, reliability, and pedestrian safety through the construction of new street elements along the M79 SBS route. Treatments will include: Bus bulbs to eliminate buses weaving in and out of bus stops, shorten crossings for pedestrians, and expand bus stop and sidewalk space. Curb extensions to shorten crossings for pedestrians. Pedestrian islands to shorten crossings and provide a mid-crossing refuge for pedestrians. Bus pads to reinforce the roadway in concrete and reduce roadway wear and tear created by buses regularly stopping at bus stops.

payload.claim_text: The 79th Street SBS capital project will build upon the improvements made for the 2017 M79 SBS launch, with the goals of further improving bus speeds, reliability, and pedestrian safety through the construction of new street elements along the M79 SBS route. Treatments will include bus bulbs, curb extensions, pedestrian islands, and bus pads.
payload.subject: M79 SBS Capital Project
